actions.details: Unable to reach GitHub API/Lovable from this execution environment (HTTP 403 from envoy), so repo permission/admin checks and Lovable domain Recover actions could not be executed.
A records resolve to Lovable target. TXT verification records are not currently visible in authoritative/public DNS responses from this environment.
Could not access Lovable UI/API to click Recover or verify certificate issuance logs.
HTTPS header check from this environment failed with CONNECT tunnel 403 before origin response; unable to validate live content or certificate chain end-to-end.

notes: To complete cutover: add/verify both TXT records in authoritative DNS, then run Lovable Domains > Recover for apex and www; re-check HTTPS from an unrestricted network.
